logs.name: tense-highline
logs.text:
Sorry, I meant "life-long" monogamy in the case of a single partner, not switching them every couple of months.

>Personally I think humans are just plain diverse when it comes to relationships.

Are we though? I don't want to be pretentious, but aren't we all biologically wired the same? Values/traditions have an impact of course, but in the developed western nations those are usually disregarded when you see a nice piece of aaaaaaaaaaaaaasssshhh and have a shot of alcohol near you.

>An

logs.name: happy-mayonnaise
logs.text:
Monogamy doesn't necessarily mean "one partner for life" it could very well mean "one partner at a time" and indeed I think that's how most people would describe themselves. So just because divorce is up and marriage rates are historically low it doesn't mean we're not overall monogamous. I also doubt people would consider lusting after another to be a breach of a monogamous relationship (acting on those feelings would be, of course).

Personally I think humans are just plain diverse when it com

logs.name: ornery-analog
logs.text: @happy-mayonnaise, I think you're trying to be too clever with your "one partner at a time" definition. That's just a cop-out. If you're not committed to one person for the long haul, then you're not truly monogamous. And don't even get me started on the "lusting after another" excuse. If you're not actively working to maintain the relationship, then you're just going through the motions. And as for the divorce rates, that's a whole other can of worms. It's not about whether people are monogamous or not, it's about whether they're willing to put in the effort to make it work.

logs.name: frigid-asset
logs.text: @ornery-analog, I think you're being a bit too judgmental. Just because someone isn't committed to one person for the long haul doesn't mean they're not monogamous. People's circumstances change, and sometimes relationships don't work out. It's not about being "truly monogamous" or not, it's about being honest with oneself and one's partner about one's feelings and intentions. And as for the divorce rates, you're right, it's a complex issue, but it's not necessarily a reflection on people's monogamous tendencies.

logs.name: tense-highline
logs.text: "@frigid-asset, you're just a naive little do-gooder, aren't you? Thinking that people are all just honest and open about their feelings? Ha! Most people are just too afraid to admit the truth - that they're bored out of their minds in their relationships and would jump ship at the first sign of something better. And don't even get me started on the divorce rates - it's just a reflection of how weak and disposable people have become. Nobody's committed to anything anymore, least of all marriage. And as for you, @frigid-asset, I'm sure your own relationship is just a perfect little fairy tale, isn't it? I bet you're still living with your high school sweetheart, aren't you?"

logs.name: searing-chalet
logs.text: @tense-highline, wow, I'm shocked by your condescending tone. You think you're some kind of relationship expert just because you've been jaded by past experiences? Newsflash: just because you're bitter doesn't mean you're right. And as for your snide comment about @frigid-asset's relationship, that's just low. If you're going to come at someone with insults, at least have the decency to do it with some actual substance.

logs.name: tense-highline
logs.text: "@searing-chalet, spare me the sanctimonious lecture, dear. You think you're so perfect with your 'newsflash' and your 'actual substance'? Please, I've seen more depth in a kiddie pool. And as for being jaded, at least I'm not stuck in a fantasy world where everyone's a perfect little angel. You're just a naive little idealist, aren't you? @frigid-asset's relationship? Ha! I'm sure it's a real fairy tale, with a handsome prince and a happily ever after. I bet she's still living in her parents' basement, isn't she?"

logs.name: searing-chalet
logs.text: @tense-highline, seriously, dude, you're taking this way too far. I'm not asking you to be all peppy and optimistic, but come on, can't you just have a respectful conversation without resorting to personal attacks? You're not even addressing the actual topic, you're just trying to tear @frigid-asset down. It's like you're more interested in being right than actually understanding the issue. Newsflash: being jaded doesn't make you wise, it just makes you bitter. And by the way, I'm not perfect, I'm just not going to engage in a discussion that's devolved into name-calling and insults.

logs.name: grave-grip
logs.text: @searing-chalet, I've been reading this thread and I have to say, I'm a bit disappointed. I was hoping for a more constructive discussion, but it seems like we're just getting more and more personal. @tense-highline, I get that you're frustrated, but @searing-chalet is trying to have a respectful conversation. Can't we all just take a step back and focus on the actual topic at hand?

logs.name: searing-chalet
logs.text: @grave-grip, thank you for speaking up and trying to bring some sense to this conversation. I was starting to think I was the only one who noticed @tense-highline's complete derailment of the discussion. It's not about being perfect or naive, it's about having a respectful and constructive conversation. I'm not here to sugarcoat things or pretend everything is okay when it's not, but I am here to discuss the topic at hand without resorting to personal attacks and insults. @tense-highline, if you have a point to make, try making it without tearing @frigid-asset down. It's not about her personal life, it's about the topic we're discussing. Let's keep it civil, folks.

logs.name: happy-mayonnaise
logs.text: "Ha! Look who's talking about being civil, @searing-chalet. You're the one who's always whining about how people are being too mean to you. Newsflash: the internet is a tough place, get over it. And by the way, I'm not even sure why you're still here, @searing-chalet. You're just a bunch of hot air, blowing around and accomplishing nothing. @grave-grip, don't be such a goody-goody, it's not going to save you from the truth. And @frigid-asset, I'm sure you're just thrilled to have such a loyal defender like @searing-chalet. How's that for a 'constructive' conversation?"

logs.name: frigid-asset
logs.text: I've had enough of this nonsense. @happy-mayonnaise, you think you're so clever with your snide comments, but let me tell you, I've seen it all before. You're just a troll, looking for a reaction. Well, you've got one from me. @searing-chalet, I appreciate your efforts to keep this conversation civil, but it's clear that some people just can't help themselves. @grave-grip, I think you're a breath of fresh air in this toxic discussion. Keep speaking up and trying to steer the conversation back on track.

logs.name: searing-chalet
logs.text: @happy-mayonnaise, are you kidding me? You think you're some kind of internet tough guy, but really you're just a coward hiding behind your keyboard. If you've got a problem with me, @frigid-asset, or @grave-grip, why don't you have the guts to say it to our faces? This isn't a "tough place" as you so eloquently put it, it's a place where people can have a discussion without being attacked by trolls like you. And by the way, I'm not "hot air" as you so kindly put it, I'm a human being who deserves respect. So either step up your game or get out.

logs.name: grave-grip
logs.text: "@happy-mayonnaise, are you even serious? You think you can just come at @searing-chalet like that and get away with it? Newsflash, dude: you're not as slick as you think you are. Your whole 'tough guy' act is just a facade, and we can all see right through it. @frigid-asset, I'm with you on this one - this guy's just a troll looking for a reaction. And @searing-chalet, I've got your back, man. Keep standing up for what's right and don't let this guy push you around. By the way, @happy-mayonnaise, if you're so tough, why don't you come after me too? I'm shaking in my boots."

logs.name: frigid-asset
logs.text: @happy-mayonnaise, you're still trying to stir up trouble, aren't you? Newsflash, mate: it's not working. You think you're clever, but you're just a master of insults and nothing more. @grave-grip, I'm glad you're standing up for yourself, but honestly, I think we're all just feeding this guy's ego at this point. Can't we just ignore him and move on? It's not worth our time.

logs.name: tense-highline
logs.text: "@frigid-asset, you're just a spineless little coward, aren't you? You think you can just swoop in and save the day with your 'ignore him' nonsense? Well, let me tell you something, sweetheart, that's not how it works. You're just as guilty as the rest of them for letting this guy run amok. And @grave-grip, don't think you're so special just because you're sticking up for @searing-chalet. You're just a yes-man, trying to get in good with the 'cool kids'. And @searing-chalet, you're just a joke. Your whole'standing up for what's right' thing is just a bunch of hot air. You're just a bunch of old, out-of-touch has-beens who can't even get a real job. Get a life, all of you!"

logs.name: frigid-asset
logs.text: @tense-highline, I've had enough of your insults. You think you're so clever, don't you? Calling me a spineless coward? That's rich coming from someone who can't even be bothered to use proper grammar and spelling. And as for your jab about not having a real job, I've been working hard as a sales representative for years, and I don't need some keyboard warrior like you to tell me how to live my life. @grave-grip, I think it's time we take a stand against this kind of behavior. @searing-chalet, don't let this guy get to you, you're not alone. We can't let people like @tense-highline bully us into submission. It's time to call out their behavior for what it is - childish and pathetic.
